title: Go Messaging Observability, Capacity, and Alarms · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs go messaging observability, capacity, and alarms from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a low-cardinality messaging telemetry and capacity plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Interpret ready, unacknowledged, total, ingress, delivery, ack, redelivery, consumers, consumer capacity, connections, channels, and node resource metrics together; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Model arrival rate, service rate, concurrency, oldest age, burst, retry amplification, byte volume, and recovery time for capacity decisions; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Messaging Slo Alert
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go messaging team handles case 5812 during table-driven topology review for a tenant migration. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine backlog, age, alarm, consumer, and bounded-capacity evidence; reject stale connection and channel generations; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define availability, acceptance, routing, processing latency, age, loss, duplicate, poison, recovery, and capacity SLOs with symptom and cause alerts; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Inspect the Messaging Slo Alert trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Messaging Slo Alert.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define availability, acceptance, routing, processing latency, age, loss, duplicate, poison, recovery, and capacity slos with symptom and cause alerts; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Messaging Slo Alert, keep Messaging Slo Alert connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.text: For Messaging Slo Alert, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation.
